minecraft:lore: {"text": "💰 售价：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "无法出售", "color": "red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "🔧 物品种类：", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "装备", "color": "light_purple", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "击败敌人时吸取生命力。", "color": "gray", "italic": false}
{"text": "被动效果 - ", "color": "white", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "生命汲取", "color": "dark_red", "bold": true}]}
{"text": "▪ 效果: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "击败敌人恢复2点生命值", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
{"text": "▪ 触发: ", "color": "gray", "italic": false, "extra": [{"text": "击杀敌人时触发", "color": "white", "bold": false}]}
